name: Security Group Unauthorized Change Response
description: Detects unauthorized changes to cloud security groups or firewall rules. Riggs AI evaluates whether the change introduces risk by analyzing the rule modification against security baselines. Unauthorized changes trigger automatic reversion to the last known good state, compliance ticket creation, change audit investigation, and team notification. Authorized changes are documented with a compliance note.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: AWS Security Hub
required_integrations.reason: Source of security group change findings and API for reverting security group rules

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create compliance tickets for unauthorized security group modifications

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify the cloud security and compliance teams of security group changes

config.description: Triggers when a security group or firewall rule is modified, such as adding inbound rules allowing 0.0.0.0/0 or removing required egress restrictions

config.additional_instructions: Evaluate security group change: does the new rule introduce excessive exposure (0.0.0.0/0), was there a change request, is the actor authorized for security group changes
config.description: AI-powered analysis of the security group modification to determine if it is authorized and whether it introduces unacceptable risk
Routes based on whether the AI assessment determined the security group change is unauthorized or high-risk

parameters.reason: Unauthorized security group change detected — reverting to last known good configuration

config.description: Automatically revert the security group to its last known good state by removing the unauthorized rule changes

config.query: CloudTrail events for security_group={{trigger_1.alert.security_group_id}} modifications in last 7 days: actors, changes made, source IPs, associated change requests
config.description: Audit the security group change history to identify all modifications and whether they correlate with approved change requests
Create a compliance ticket documenting the unauthorized change, reversion, and audit trail
Notify the security and compliance teams of the unauthorized security group change and automatic reversion

parameters.note: Reviewed by Riggs AI (cloud_security template). Security group change determined to be authorized and within acceptable risk parameters. Actor: {{trigger_1.alert.actor}}. Assessment: {{analyze_1.summary}}

config.description: Document that the security group change was determined to be authorized
Security group unauthorized change response complete
